metadata.description: Full resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version": "Notebook/1.0", "items": [{"type": 9, "content": {"version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "parameters": [{"id": "a1b2c3d4-0001-4000-8000-000000000001", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "DefaultSubscription_Internal", "type": 1, "isRequired": true, "query": "where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| take 1
| project subscriptionId", "crossComponentResources": ["value::selected"], "isHiddenWhenLocked": true, "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources"}, {"id": "a1b2c3d4-0002-4000-8000-000000000002", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "Subscription", "label": "Subscription", "type": 6, "query": "summarize by subscriptionId
| project value = strcat("/subscriptions/", subscriptionId), label = subscriptionId, selected = iff(subscriptionId =~ '{DefaultSubscription_Internal}', true, false)
", "crossComponentResources": ["value::selected"], "typeSettings": {"additionalResourceOptions": [], "showDefault": false}, "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources"}, {"id": "a1b2c3d4-0003-4000-8000-000000000003", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "Workspace", "label": "Workspace", "type": 5, "isRequired": true, "query": "resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| project id", "crossComponentResources": ["{Subscription}"], "typeSettings": {"resourceTypeFilter": {"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces": true}, "additionalResourceOptions": []}, "queryType": 1, "resourceType": "microsoft.resourcegraph/resources"}, {"id": "a1b2c3d4-0004-4000-8000-000000000004", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "TimeRange", "label": "Time Range", "type": 4, "value": {"durationMs": 7776000000}, "typeSettings": {"selectableValues": [{"durationMs": 86400000}, {"durationMs": 172800000}, {"durationMs": 604800000}, {"durationMs": 1209600000}, {"durationMs": 2592000000}, {"durationMs": 5184000000}, {"durationMs": 7776000000}], "allowCustom": true}}, {"id": "a1b2c3d4-0005-4000-8000-000000000005", "version": "KqlParameterItem/1.0", "name": "TableFilter", "label": "Table", "type": 2, "isRequired": true, "query": "datatable(DataType:string)["All"] | union (Usage | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d) | distinct DataType) | order by iff(DataType == "All", " ", DataType) asc", "crossComponentResources": ["{Workspace}"], "value": "All", "typeSettings": {"additionalResourceOptions": [], "showDefault": false}, "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"}], "style": "above", "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"}, "name": "parameters - main"}, {"type": 1, "content": {"json": "## Workspace & Data Lake Usage Report
This workbook analyses ingestion across **Analytics** and **Lake (Auxiliary)** tiers using the Usage table and the **Tables REST API** for accurate plan classification."}, "name": "text - header"}, {"type": 11, "content": {"version": "LinkItem/1.0", "style": "tabs", "links": [{"id": "tab-analytics", "cellValue": "selectedTab", "linkTarget": "parameter", "linkLabel": "Analytics Tables", "subTarget": "analytics", "style": "link"}, {"id": "tab-lake", "cellValue": "selectedTab", "linkTarget": "parameter", "linkLabel": "Lake Tables", "subTarget": "lake", "style": "link"}]}, "name": "tabs - main"}, {"type": 12, "content": {"version": "NotebookGroup/1.0", "groupType": "editable", "title": "Analytics Tables", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "### Analytics Tier
Table plans from the **Tables REST API**. Showing only `plan == Analytics`."}, "name": "text-a"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "{"version": "ARMEndpoint/1.0", "data": null, "headers": [], "method": "GET", "path": "/subscriptions/{Workspace:subscriptionid}/resourceGroups/{Workspace:resourcegroup}/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/{Workspace:name}/tables?api-version=2025-07-01", "urlParams": [], "batchDisabled": false, "transformers": [{"type": "jsonpath", "settings": {"tablePath": "$.value[?(@.properties.plan=='Analytics')]", "columns": [{"path": "$.name", "columnid": "TableName"}, {"path": "$.properties.plan", "columnid": "TablePlan"}]}}]}", "size": 4, "title": "API - Analytics tables (hidden)", "queryType": 12, "visualization": "table"}, "conditionalVisibility": {"parameterName": "neverShow", "comparison": "isEqualTo", "value": "neverShow"}, "name": "api-analytics"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| where '{TableFilter}' == 'All' or DataType == '{TableFilter}'
| summarize ['Total (GB)'] = sum(Quantity) / 1000 by ['Table Name'] = DataType, IsBillable
| order by ['Total (GB)'] desc", "size": 4, "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces", "crossComponentResources": ["{Workspace}"]}, "conditionalVisibility": {"parameterName": "neverShow", "comparison": "isEqualTo", "value": "neverShow"}, "name": "usage-total-analytics"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "{"version": "Merge/1.0", "merges": [{"id": "m-grid-analytics", "mergeType": "innerunique", "leftTable": "api-analytics", "rightTable": "usage-total-analytics", "leftColumn": "TableName", "rightColumn": "Table Name"}], "projectRename": [{"originalName": "[api-analytics].TableName", "mergedName": "Table Name", "fromId": "m-grid-analytics"}, {"originalName": "[api-analytics].TablePlan", "mergedName": "TablePlan", "fromId": "m-grid-analytics"}, {"originalName": "[usage-total-analytics].Total (GB)", "mergedName": "Total (GB)", "fromId": "m-grid-analytics"}, {"originalName": "[usage-total-analytics].IsBillable", "mergedName": "IsBillable", "fromId": "m-grid-analytics"}, {"originalName": "[usage-total-analytics].Table Name"}]}", "size": 0, "showAnalytics": true, "title": "Analytics Tables - Total Ingestion for {TimeRange:label}", "showExportToExcel": true, "queryType": 7, "gridSettings": {"formatters": [{"columnMatch": "TablePlan", "formatter": 18, "formatOptions": {"thresholdsOptions": "colors", "thresholdsGrid": [{"operator": "==", "thresholdValue": "Analytics", "representation": "blue", "text": "{0}{1}"}, {"operator": "==", "thresholdValue": "Auxiliary", "representation": "green", "text": "Auxiliary/Lake"}, {"operator": "Default", "thresholdValue": null, "text": "{0}{1}"}]}}, {"columnMatch": "Total (GB)", "formatter": 3, "formatOptions": {"palette": "blue"}, "numberFormat": {"unit": 39, "options": {"style": "decimal", "maximumFractionDigits": 2}}}, {"columnMatch": "IsBillable", "formatter": 18, "formatOptions": {"thresholdsOptions": "colors", "thresholdsGrid": [{"operator": "==", "thresholdValue": "true", "representation": "green", "text": "True"}, {"operator": "Default", "thresholdValue": null, "representation": "blueDark", "text": "{0}{1}"}]}}], "filter": true, "sortBy": [{"itemKey": "$gen_bar_Total (GB)_2", "sortOrder": 2}]}, "sortBy": [{"itemKey": "$gen_bar_Total (GB)_2", "sortOrder": 2}]}, "showPin": false, "name": "merge-grid-analytics"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| where '{TableFilter}' == 'All' or DataType == '{TableFilter}'
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize ['Table Size (GB)'] = sum(Quantity) / 1000 by ['Table Name'] = DataType, bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by ['Table Size (GB)'] desc", "size": 4, "queryType": 0, "resourceType": "microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces", "crossComponentResources": ["{Workspace}"]}, "conditionalVisibility": {"parameterName": "neverShow", "comparison": "isEqualTo", "value": "neverShow"}, "name": "usage-daily-analytics"}, {"type": 3, "content": {"version": "KqlItem/1.0", "query": "{"version": "Merge/1.0", "merges": [{"id": "m-bar-analytics", "mergeType": "innerunique", "leftTable": "api-analytics", "rightTable": "usage-daily-analytics", "leftColumn": "TableName", "rightColumn": "Table Name"}], "projectRename": [{"originalName": "[usage-daily-analytics].Table Name", "mergedName": "Table Name", "fromId": "m-bar-analytics"}, {"originalName": "[usage-daily-analytics].Table Size (GB)", "mergedName": "Table Size (GB)", "fromId": "m-bar-analytics"}, {"originalName": "[usage-daily-analytics].TimeGenerated", "mergedName": "TimeGenerated", "fromId": "m-bar-analytics"}, {"originalName": "[api-analytics].TableName"}, {"originalName": "[api-analytics].TablePlan"}]}", "size": 1, "title": "Analytics Tables - Daily Trend", "queryType": 7, "visualization": "barchart", "chartSettings": {"ySettings": {"numberFormatSettings": {"unit": 39, "options": {"style": "decimal", "useGrouping": true}}}}}, "name": "merge-bar-analytics"}]}, "conditionalVisibility": {"parameterName": "selectedTab", "comparison": "isEqualTo", "value": "analytics"}, "name": "group - analytics"}, {"type": 12, "content": {"version": "NotebookGroup/1.0", "groupType": "editable", "title": "Lake Tables", "items": [{"type": 1, "content": {"json": "### Lake / Auxiliary Tier
